ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was created */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates or location data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location mentioned in the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags included in the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for iPhone, Twitter Web App) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name or handle of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location mentioned in the user's profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or bio of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends or accounts the user follows */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a verified account */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "protected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's account is protected */,
  "verified_type" TEXT /* Type of verification (e.g., government, business, news, etc.) */,
  "date_last_active" TEXT /* Last date the user was active */,
  "account_suspended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the account has been suspended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the hashtag has been used */,
  "first_used" TEXT /* Date and time when the hashtag was first used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time when the hashtag was last used */,
  "trending" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the hashtag is currently trending */,
  "trending_score" REAL /* Score indicating the trendiness of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the hashtag was used in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the city is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_locations" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the geolocation data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the geolocation data (e.g., user, tweet metadata) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "trending" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the topic is currently trending */,
  "trending_score" REAL /* Score indicating the trendiness of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the topic to the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_change" REAL /* Change in sentiment score over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
